summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that FDS is currently testing its Daily 50MA support zone near $232.21. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 50.0%. This is a fresh test of the support, suggesting that optimal buy-side liquidity remains intact. This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
